If a person starts to be kind to others, they may start to feel like a kind person. If they start to read books every day, they may become a reader. So the tie between doing and being is strong. The case rests on the fact that we are what we do. This is a strong way to think about how we grow and change.

english_query: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
ugf_response:
When you know something, you might think that giving all that you know to everyone is a good thing. You might think that if everyone knows what you know, the world will be better. But this is not always true. There are many reasons why keeping some things to yourself is a way to act that shows you think well.

First, we must think about the people who might use what you know in a bad way. If you know how to make something that can hurt people, and you tell everyone how to do it, you are helping the bad people. In this case, keeping the information to yourself is a way to keep people safe. If the information could be used to hurt, then sharing it could lead to great hurt.

Second, we must think about how people work together. In many groups, people have different ways of doing things. If one person tells everyone their way to do something, the special way might not work anymore. If everyone knows the same thing at the same time, no one has a way to be better than the others. This can make it hard for people to do the hard work they should do. If they cannot make it their own, they might not be able to keep doing their work.

Third, there is the matter of how people work together. Sometimes, a person or a group of people works on something that no one else knows.
